meta.title: Acrobatic Gymnastics Club Management Software in Mexico | Zaltyko - FMGM
meta.description: Manage your federated acrobatic gymnastics club with Zaltyko. Full control over athletes, categories, pairs, groups, difficulty levels and FMGM-CONADE licenses.

hero.headline: Manage your federated acrobatic gymnastics club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over athletes, categories, acrobatic pairs and groups, difficulty levels and licenses. Olimpiada Nacional and Circuito Nacional.

painPoints.generic: Coordinating acrobatic pairs and groups is chaotic. Tracking gymnasts by category, difficulty levels and compositions on paper is a disaster.
painPoints.specific: Managing pair and group combinations, coordinating when a gymnast changes category, tracking D (difficulty) and E (execution) scores.
